name: Synchronized Climate Crop Failure
description: Concurrent record droughts and floods in major breadbaskets across South America, Europe, and Asia slash yields and trigger export restrictions. The shock propagates from grain markets to livestock, food inflation, and political stability.
trigger_event: Triple-continent extreme weather destroys harvest outlook in the same marketing year

sync_extreme_weather.event: Droughts and floods hit Argentina, EU, and South Asia in one season
sync_extreme_weather.detail: FAO food price index rose sharply in 2022 after Ukraine war and weather shocks; multi-breadbasket failure is a documented tail risk in IPCC and agricultural economics literature.
sync_extreme_weather.source: FAO Food Price Index history; IPCC WGII food security chapter

rice_disruption.event: Asian rice belts see uneven monsoon and heat stress
rice_disruption.detail: India banned non-basmati white rice exports in 2023 (~10M tonnes); price-sensitive consumers face abrupt rationing when exporters tighten.
rice_disruption.source: Reuters India export ban 2023; USDA PSD rice data

grain_yield_shock.event: Corn and soybean yields fall in Argentina and southern Brazil
grain_yield_shock.detail: 2022–2023 La Niña already cut Argentine soy; combined corn/soy shortfalls move Chicago futures sharply.
grain_yield_shock.source: USDA WASDE; CONAB Brazil crop reports

grain_trade_fragmentation.event: Export bans and licensing slow global grain flow
grain_trade_fragmentation.detail: After 2022, 20+ countries imposed food export restrictions per IFPRI tracker; fragmentation adds 15–30 day delivery uncertainty.
grain_trade_fragmentation.source: IFPRI export restriction tracker; World Bank trade briefs

wheat_corn_price_spike.event: Wheat and corn futures jump to multi-year highs
wheat_corn_price_spike.detail: CBOT wheat exceeded $12/bushel in 2022; corn peaked near $8. A synchronized shortfall could approach those bands adjusted for 2026 baseline.
wheat_corn_price_spike.source: CME Group settlement data; FAO cereal price sub-index

feed_cost_explosion.event: Livestock feed costs surge, squeezing producer margins
feed_cost_explosion.detail: Feed is ~50–70% of variable costs for intensive livestock; 2022 U.S. farm sector saw record cost inflation per USDA ERS.

meat_dairy_price_rise.event: Retail meat and dairy inflation accelerates
meat_dairy_price_rise.detail: OECD–FAO outlook links feed costs to animal product prices with 3–9 month lag; 2022 EU retail meat rose high single digits YoY.
meat_dairy_price_rise.source: OECD-FAO Agricultural Outlook; Eurostat HICP food

headline_food_cpi.event: National food CPI prints double-digit in import-dependent states
headline_food_cpi.detail: 2022 saw Turkey food inflation >90% YoY; Egypt bread subsidy strain; many EM food weights in CPI exceed 30%.
headline_food_cpi.source: IMF World Economic Outlook food inflation tables; national statistical offices

street_protests_em.event: Food-price protests and political instability rise
street_protests_em.detail: ACLED and World Bank link food spikes to unrest; 2007–2008 and 2010–2011 episodes show rapid cascade from prices to politics.
street_protests_em.source: ACLED conflict data; World Bank food riot literature

personal_grocery_stress.event: Your weekly grocery spend rises and staple choices narrow
personal_grocery_stress.detail: Household food budget share increases fastest for lowest income quintiles; substitution toward calories over diversity.
